review_title: Excellent tool on the market, game changer!
description: Gulp of fresh air on the QA field
author: Maksym M.
pros: It allows work with tests inside team workflow, not only for QA managers in their unreadable spreadsheets
cons: We always want more, but live connection via chats or social media makes Testomat different
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It is a very convenient platform for managing test cases
description: I often use the platform to write test cases and track identified issues. I monitor the team’s work and create bugs.
author: Alina L.
pros: It is a very convenient platform for managing test cases. The continuous improvements to the platform are really pleasing—new features and enhancements are regularly added.
cons: I can’t find any Cons — everything works perfectly for me. However, the layout could be improved for smaller screens.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great idea, but execution is not
author: Azariah E.
pros: The fact that the tests could be linked and synced
cons: The really basic functionality of maintaining and managing steps for example. I don't see how that is anything special than just doing it in the IDE itself
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best TMS out there
description: Use it every day. Still learning what else I can do with it. Don't consider anything else now
author: Hennadii M.
pros: Built in tests results tracking. I can find why a test failed a month ago really easy. Testomat also has tons of cool useful features I love
cons: It's relatively new so sometimes I could find bugs. But those are not critical and other TMS don't have such functionality to find bugs in :)
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Navigating Test Case Management with Testomat.io: A Personal Insight
description: I have experience with Redmine and TestRail. Testomat.io is different from these tools because it allows you to sync test cases directly from the code, which reduces maintenance costs. However, sometimes I find the UI not very user-friendly; this might be because I am used to pop-up UIs rather than having buttons on the side tab. Overall, Testomat.io is a good product, but there’s room for improvement.
author: lee V.
pros: Testomat.io supports BDD, JIRA, and Confluence. When I was looking to introduce modern testing practices to my company, we needed a tool that could help manage our test cases, including manual test cases, acceptance test cases, and other types of tests (such as integration tests, etc.). Testomat.io proved to be exactly what we needed.
cons: My company develops AIoT products, and I have to use different testing frameworks for various purposes. For example, I write acceptance test cases using Gherkin and Python for the backend, and TypeScript for the frontend. However, it can be challenging to manage all the test cases in a single project. I often have to create multiple projects for the same product to accommodate the different testing requirements.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Cool tool for managing test materials, such as test cases
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1) Understood, it's user-friendly and comfortable to use. 2) Easy project documentation management. 3) Easy integration with other tools.
cons: Easy integration with other tools for our project
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Good system for automated tests with nice analytics in place
description: We're happy that now we have central system that holds all test execution results with history and versions. We do releases frequently, testomat provides good analytics to make a wise decision on quality before release.
author: Volodymyr K.
pros: Reporting and analytics for automated tests. My team and I were looking for a system that will provide storage for our test automation execution and that will do reports and analytics automatically for us. Testomat is specifically designed for automated tests which implemented in a really nice modern way. You need one command to import your tests, one command to execute your tests, and you are done. We have Cypress tests. Cypress is supported natively out-of-the box. Reports is working in real-time way. Analytics are building automatically. There notifications to slack so we connected such reporter to our development channel to track testing progress on daily basis.
cons: Our test report requirements is to have screenshots and video-recording for each failures. There were some issues with S3 configuration to make it available on testomat side.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Tastomat.io delivers an amazing working experience
author: Nadiia V.
pros: In my experience, the best thing about Testomat.io is its great UI/UX. The tool is built logically, and you can understand how to use it properly within just a couple of moments. Moreover, the documentation is very useful and helps a lot.
cons: As someone who frequently writes test cases, I can attest to the fact that text editor can be confusing at times. For instance, when you have a numbered list and need to add a step in the middle, the numbering doesn't update automatically. This means that you have to manually correct the numbers of the steps.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good testing and test automation tool that greatly simplifies the software quality assurance process
author: Andrey T.
pros: interface, flexibility, ease of Implementation, integration with frameworks, what I need. It also facilitates QA interaction within the team and the distribution of cases between departments. Also so good support team
cons: a bit cumbersome, documentation not always clear
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My experience using this tool
description: I like the simplicity of this TCMS and that whenever customers have feature requests they are accommodated. Great customer support. The price is slightly lower than the other services propose. Except of the trial period, the tool provides completely free subscription for small QA needs.
author: Vipin J.
pros: Good integration with automated tests and CI\CD platform. User-story issue management is powered not just Jira but also with AzureDevOps, and Github. I considered the possibilities of Jira integration. I was pretty surprised to know running the BDD and automated tests feature directly from Jira
cons: In general, I liked it. However, I haven't used it yet on a commercial test project. It was postponed to the future by me.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: The best for JavaScript/TypeScript automated tests
description: Clear and conscious reporting for manual QA and non-technical persons. Testing process became easy to go. Even newbie can get started really quickly. Transforming manual tests in automated tests are now automated fully. No manual job should be done there.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: JavaScript and TypeScript are our standards for automating tests. Our test processes consist of converting manual testing into automated tests, maintaining test automation scripts, executing tests on different platforms, reporting test results, and building test analytics. We found testomat just right in time. Manual tests were managed in checklists and files. Automation QA process was separated from manual testing. We built one a stable testing approach where manual tests created in testomat, converted automatically there once script is implemented, analytics and test reporting are working automatically once no-code integration is done. Now we have superb testing process that is clear and transparent for everyone in a team.
cons: We have several testing projects and each project has a different technology stack. Jest is used on one of such project. We wanted to configure passing meta information from logging system to testomat but it didn't work. Asked support, waiting for a fix.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A Top-Notch Test Automation Management Tool
description: We are extremely happy with our overall experience using Testomat. It has significantly improved our testing processes, making them more efficient and effective. The tool's features, ease of use, and responsive customer support have all contributed to our high level of satisfaction.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What stands out the most about Testomat is its "all-in-one" nature. It streamlines testing, automation, and management into a single, comprehensive tool, simplifying the entire testing process.
cons: I don't find anything essential to dislike about Testomat. It has proven to be a valuable and versatile tool for our testing needs.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I have tested this system on my 2 projects and I want to say that I am satisfied
description: Testomat.io solves the issues of structuring and grouping testing, displaying test results
author: Bohdan O.
pros: I've been using this TMS for a little over 1 month, so I have a lot to say and assure you that it's a cool thing that will help both automated testers and manual testers. Their manual deserves praise and covers all my questions about this system. I had a few questions, and within 10-20 minutes of support time, I got all my answers and tips on what to do and where to find the answer at any time. I also liked the ease of use, the ease of creating bug reports and attaching them to tests (both automated and manual), the ability to connect CI, Jira. This is a developing product and I hope that it will be the best TMS and will be known all over the world.
cons: It's hard for me to write about the problems because I can't point them out, but it's possible that they don't have many ways to report test results now, but I think they will fix it soon
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Experience using testomat.io
author: Andrii R.
pros: Testomat.io is fantastic for our testing needs. The development team is quick to respond, and we can request custom features. It's easy to set up in our project and works smoothly with Version Control Systems and Jira. What's especially helpful is the ability to link tests and test cases using IDs, streamlining our work. Plus, the dashboard provides great project metrics with coverage per feature.
cons: I would like to see in the future improvements related to the Jira plugin
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Really flexible, simple and useful application for managing of the testing process
description: Testomat.io has solved the problem of managing both manual and automated testing process. So today we can do it in one application.
author: Mykola B.
pros: We have just started using the testomat.io application, but we are already delighted with the various features:- a large number of integrations (for example, Jira, Jenkins, Git) helps to implement the program in the already project ecosystem- possibility of smooth transfer of existing test cases from another test management system- a convenient and clear user interface makes interaction with the application extremely pleasant
cons: Due to the fact that the application is in the process of active development, there are sometimes bugs in the application, which is natural for an application at this stage of the cycle. The support department responds quickly to requests for problems and fixes them.Much of the functionality is still under development, but should be available for use shortly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent automation management tool
description: Easy to manage test cases. Link requirements to tests in a simple and intuitive way. If you are using frameworks like Mocha or Playwright then Testomatio will suit you for monitoring execution results + additional testing logs...
author: Vitalii M.
pros: The customer support is excellent. Reply very quickly. Helps our team every time.
cons: If you do not carefully read the documentation, then there may be problems with understanding the basic settings. You need to be very careful about this.)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A convenient tool for analyzing the results of test runs
description: Thanks to Testomat.io, I can provide information about the development of our product information to the stakeholders. Also, I get a lot of statistics in a convenient format. Combine automation and tests made in manual
author: Anatolii O.
pros: Ability to analyze different test runs. Combining automation and manual testing
cons: I don't really like the color scheme also I will want to see a more functional design
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Useful test management tool
author: Yehor S.
pros: I like the editing options within the test case and navigation through the website
cons: I don't like that system frequently logging me out, especially when I use Safari
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great test toold for Automation Engineers
description: Overall, I have a great experiance using such tool. Waiting for Ruby gem in the future. Hope, many automation frameworks will switch using this one.
author: Volodya S.
pros: Testomat IO is a great tool for metrics. Fresh UI looks good and it's really handy. Everything works smooth. This tool is super universal for QA and AQA EngineersI do like tests reporting
cons: There is free analogue named - allure wit the same price, but it supports only Cloud reporting.Allure also can be used for free
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good choice for middle-sized test automation teams
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Reporting BDD support Test parametrization
cons: I used only what I needed, thus I cannot summarize the cons yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Title
author: Pavel N.
pros: Integration with jira and mix run manual and automation
cons: Documentation and description how to use it
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Product has good potential
author: Dwane D.
pros: The team behind it is quick to react to the features requested by users and to further integrate it with various tools used in the industry.
cons: In the end my company had already decided on another tool so I could not evaluate further than the trial period.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
